title: Sort Features by Popularity
titleCn: 按受欢迎程度排列功能

detail.title: Sort Features by Popularity
detail.exampleTestcases:
["cooler","lock","touch"]
["i like cooler cooler","lock touch cool","locker like touch"]
["a","aa","b","c"]
["a","a aa","a a a a a","b a"]
hints: Use a hash map to count the frequency of each word of each string.
Use the map for sorting the features.
